content.speakerText: I should head out soon—this was such a great night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚聊得太开心了。

options.text: Same here! Can’t wait for Sunday—have a safe trip home!
Yeah, I’m tired too. Let’s just end it.
Fine, go ahead. I don’t care.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极、温暖的语气，呼应了对方的情感并表达了期待再会，符合‘温馨道别’场景。选项2虽礼貌但缺乏情感共鸣；选项3语气消极，破坏氛围；选项4冷漠无礼，完全不符合场景要求。

content.speakerText: It’s getting late—I really enjoyed hanging out with you tonight.
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了，今晚和你相处真的很开心。

options.text: Same here! Let’s do this again soon—drive safe!
I guess I should go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅表达了共鸣（Same here!），还使用了积极的未来期待（Let’s do this again soon）和关心的结束语（drive safe），完整体现温馨道别。选项2虽然正确但过于简短，缺乏情感温度；选项3和4语气被动或冷漠，不符合‘留下好印象’的目标。

content.speakerText: I’ve had such a wonderful time—thanks for making tonight special.
content.speakerTextCn: 我度过了非常美好的时光，谢谢你让今晚如此特别。

options.text: Aww, thank you! I’m so glad you enjoyed it—take care and text me tomorrow!
Yeah, I guess I should get going.

content.explanation: 正确答案用温暖的回应（Aww, thank you!）肯定了对方的情感，同时表达了关心（take care）和未来联结（text me tomorrow），符合温馨道别的核心。选项2过于轻描淡写，削弱了情感价值；选项3和4未回应对方的情感表达，显得敷衍。
